videos.title: Stroke Imaging playlist
videos.evidence_type: neuroradiology teaching playlist with embedded YouTube videos
videos.relevance: Covers stroke presentation, imaging workflow, CT/CTA/CTP, MRI DWI/ADC/FLAIR, case review, vascular territories, complications, and mimics.

videos.title: Stroke - presentation and imaging evaluation
videos.relevance: High-level imaging workflow and timing of CT, CTP, DWI, and FLAIR changes.

videos.title: Stroke vascular distributions - Imaging Case Review
videos.relevance: Vascular-territory examples for ACA, MCA, PCA, cerebellar, border-zone, thalamic, and venous infarct mimics.

videos.title: Stroke imaging - complications and mimics
videos.relevance: Complications and mimics, including hemorrhagic conversion, cortical necrosis, contrast staining, seizure, migraine, and venous infarct.

videos.title: CTA and CTP in the Evaluation & Treatment of Acute Ischemic Stroke Patients: Standards & Pitfalls
videos.source: Foundation for Education and Research in Neurological Emergencies
videos.relevance: CTA/CTP acute ischemic stroke imaging standards and pitfalls.

videos.title: Use of MRI (DWI, SWI, FLAIR) in Acute Ischemic Stroke
videos.relevance: Expert radiology teaching on DWI, SWI, FLAIR, acute infarct core, false negatives, and mimics.

videos.title: AHA/ASA Early Management of Patients With Acute Ischemic Stroke 2026 Update - Key Messages
videos.relevance: High-level 2026 AHA/ASA guideline changes relevant to treatment-context framing.

videos.title: Mismatch FLAIR and Diffusion in Cranial Magnetic Resonance Imaging
videos.relevance: Focused DWI/FLAIR mismatch example for unknown-onset or wake-up stroke context.

videos.title: Advances in the Treatment and Diagnosis of Acute Stroke: What You Need to Know
videos.relevance: Broad public/clinical education on acute stroke diagnosis and treatment advances.

videos.title: Ischemic and Hemorrhagic Strokes | High Yield
videos.relevance: Broad clinical overview including diagnosis and imaging; lower imaging specificity than neuroradiology sources.

videos.title: Diffusion Weighted Imaging (DWI) in Neuroradiology... made easy!
videos.relevance: Explains DWI, ADC maps, true diffusion restriction, T2 shine-through, and why ischemic stroke restricts diffusion.

videos.title: MRI in Acute Infarct - Role of Diffusion Weighted Imaging (DWI)
videos.relevance: Resident-facing stroke imaging lecture focused on MRI and DWI utility for acute infarct detection.

videos.title: Imaging approaches for acute ischemic stroke
videos.relevance: High-level acute ischemic stroke imaging approach including CT, MRI, CTA, CTP, core, penumbra, and late-window selection.

videos.title: Stroke Imaging - Case 1
videos.relevance: Case-based CT/CTP/CTA stroke workflow showing core infarct, tissue at risk, ICA occlusion, and post-treatment infarct outcome.

videos.title: Stroke Imaging - Case 2
videos.relevance: Case-based MCA territory infarct workflow with CT hypodensity, CTP core/penumbra, DSA occlusion, and post-thrombectomy MRI.

status: starter video evidence set; below final video target
